phrases.intent_en: I have a reservation for the cellar tour.
phrases.text_local: J'ai une réservation pour la visite des caves.
phrases.pronunciation: zhay ewn ray-zair-vah-SYON poor lah vee-ZEET day KAV
phrases.cultural_note: Veuve Clicquot's historic cellars in Reims span 24km of tunnels. The house was founded in 1772 and became famous under the Widow (Veuve) Clicquot's leadership.

responses.phonetic: wee VOH-truh NOHN seel voo PLAY
responses.french: Oui, votre nom s'il vous plaît.

phrases.intent_en: Is tasting included in the tour price?
phrases.text_local: La dégustation est incluse dans le prix de la visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah day-goos-tah-SYOHN eh tahn-KLOOZ dahn luh PREE duh lah vee-ZEET
phrases.cultural_note: Most champagne house tours include at least one glass of champagne.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book a cellar tour at Veuve Clicquot
phrases.text_local: Comment réserver une visite des caves Veuve Clicquot ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ray-zur-VAY oon vee-ZEET day kahv vuv klee-KOH
phrases.cultural_note: Veuve Clicquot was founded in 1772; it was the iconic Widow Clicquot who perfected riddling and invented the modern champagne cellar.

responses.english: Via their website or by phone.
responses.phonetic: par lur SEET an-tair-NET oo par tay-lay-FOHN.
responses.french: Par leur site internet ou par téléphone.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what makes Veuve Clicquot Yellow Label different
phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce qui distingue le Yellow Label Veuve Clicquot ?
phrases.pronunciation: kes kee dees-TAN-guh luh YEL-oh LAY-bel vuv klee-KOH

responses.english: Its blend of Pinot Noir and its richness on the palate.
responses.phonetic: son ah-sahm-BLAHZH duh pee-NOH NWAR ay sah ree-SHES ahn BOOSH.
responses.french: Son assemblage de Pinot Noir et sa richesse en bouche.

phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la boutique Veuve Clicquot ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah boo-TEEK vuv klee-KOH

responses.english: At the entrance to the estate, on your right.
responses.phonetic: ah lahn-TRAY doo doh-MEN, soor votr DRWAT.
responses.french: À l'entrée du domaine, sur votre droite.

vocabulary.word_en: widow (the brand name means 'The Widow Clicquot')
